review_body: I bought this so that I could experience the amazing playoff run of the 2024-2025 Philadelphia Eagles. Go Birds. I used this as the centerpiece of an outdoor party tent to watch the Eagles completly destroy the KC Chiefs. It was beautiful. I have watched that superbowl 37 times in the last 3 months.It was the best day of my life. And this projector is well worth the money.

Nice projector. This is for my grandpa birthday gift. He is very happy to have this purchase. He loves to stay home watching movie. Friendly user. Easy to use and set up with his TV either using wifi or bluetooth. There is another of what he likes is he loves to go camping and he now can bring it with him because its very lightweighted and small. The picture of the quality is as good as TV. Thank you very much product arrived on time and i m able to give to him during this weekend in his bday party.

I bought for around $50 during Black Friday. I wanted an affordable beginner-friendly projector that I can project on my bedroom ceiling and take outside on my deck when I have company over. I haven't tried taking it outside but it projects perfectly onto my ceiling. It's Bluetooth capable so I use my Shokz headphones for sound. The audio is decent but i prefer connecting to another device that sounds better.

This is so cool! I got it for my kids for Christmas and got so stuck on “Checking it out/setting it up” that I was still watching it when the kids came in from school. 🤣 the dial makes it so clear..even with out a projector screen it looks very clear. Now I have to buy all the kids one and keep this one for me! Only downside is you can't download Disney but you can connect it to an Xbox if you want. 👍👍

Really surprised with the quality image of this for the price and size. Sound quality is not amazing but doesn't mean is bad, is just normal since is more design sharing video, app works fine, and image although is not perfect is good enough to see the colors, which was my main concern before buying, reminds me the quality of the cheap tvs from the beginning of the 2000s lol, but is good enough as an extra secondary tv as I need it in my case.

Good projector for price. I would recommend you to still use a firestick or roku for applications because the software itself on the projector is a little glitchy. It is definitely worth your money though.

Bought based on some article that popped up. Said 400$ projector practically free (lots of these lately) but I bit. I figured 58 bucks what to lose? Well it won't airplay it won't stream you tube tv it will play “files” but so dim it almost like a bad drive in. It has basic android tv functionality but not much more simple and yet kinda worthless and not really worth it. Ez to operate and focus for what that's worth. Unless totally dark room your best option is something else.

made my purchase based off of this review https://www.mensjournal.com/gear/artsea-4k-1080p-smart-mini-projector-walmart-sale-january-2025 clearly not worth $400. It's worth what I paid. For that the picture quality is okay the Keystone feature works very well as soon as you adjust it, it auto focuses within milliseconds. There is no brightness control so at times the scenes from what you're watching do look dark. I got it up to about 120 in and was able to adjust the manual focus to give me clear picture above that things get blurry. Don't recommend using the audio from as it's no good. My Bluetooth speaker did the trick. To give you context your cell phone may sound better for a movie. Has Android Play store good for Apps %26 games and is Netflix cert.

Two stars for the WiFi, Bluetooth, and high resolution. But this product is not compatible with AirPlay. I reached out to the company and they told me to use a cable… Another thing is that it projected a black spot. Definitely something wrong with it.

Money and time wast.. it won't support 4K.. corners will be blurred out and You might get headache if you watch movies with inconsistent quality of the picture.. Auto correct is another on issue.. I do manually correct the keystone to make it square.. It will be HD when you project it for some 1.5 feet width.. it will blur out when it goes bigger screen size.. Projectors should be used for many years so plz spend little more to get good one.

This projector is absolutely amazing. Was very surprised for the price. The sound is good and picture quality is super clear.just plugged in and connected to WiFi worksss so good and comes with HDMI to hook up to computer or anything else!.

This took almost no time to set up, its simple small and portable. I tested it on the floor and after verifying the important stuff worked, I took the mounting base off and screwed it to the ceiling with a single screw and washer. Its now installed and working great. I'm surprised at the quality of the image, it's very clear. The auto-keystone function straightened the image out instantly. With WiFi, Android OS and a remote controller, its a fine standalone entertainment projector. I have not tried casting, nor the USB or HDMI functions, but the streaming is fast and smooth. The only minor complaint is the brightness of the image. Its definitely not bright enough for use in a well lit room, but it works well in a dim room and it's great in the dark. Sound quality is good, it's not loud, but it's crystal clear. Besides, that's what Bluetooth is for. Overall, this is a good, easy to use projector .

i bought the projector for our family room and the quality was amazing. Everyone loved the projector. it was so easy to use and it was not much of a clean up. we did movie night on my doughter's birthday and her freinds asked for the products afterwards. the only downside is that the audio was little lower so i used bluetooth speaker and was fine. Overall Me and my family loved it a lot ..

I got the Mini Projector Smart for Movie Projection recently, and it's been awesome. Super easy to set up and use, and the picture quality is pretty impressive for such a small device. It's lightweight and portable, so I've been moving it around the house and even used it for an outdoor movie night. One cool thing I tried was projecting onto the ceiling while lying in bed—such a fun experience! Check out the photo. The built-in speakers are decent. Overall, it's a great little projector for the price.

I am simply amazed with this product how well it performs. The most i liked about this product is easy to install. Just took 5 minutes from opening to operating. It works with wifi and price is very affordable. I am enjoying watching shows on this projector. Easy to move and setup in any room also you can carry it with you if you want to on a trip.

This is a smart and compact 4k projector. I liked it, especially at this price range. It works well actually beyond my expectations for this price. I thought it would not work on the wifi but I did. I can watch Prime, Netflix, and YouTube on it. I need not to stick to the TV all the time. I can move to any room I want to and watch anything there. It's very easy to set up. It's worth buying.

I really liked this product. Compact and nice design easy to move and install. I liked the pixels and quality of this projector. It really helps my baby to calm down. I also enjoy watching movies on this projector. It can be connected with WiFi and then we can enjoy Netflix and YouTube very convenient. Can we moved to any room and anywhere without any issues. So far I am very happy with my purchase .

I love it so much it's absolutely amazing the only problem is that I have an iPhone and am unable to connect my phone the only option available is Miracast for android or I can spend $20 to buy Miracast on my phone (the app is free the service is not) but being able to mirror my phone was a big part of why I ordered so I'm very disappointed. I also saw it being sold for cheaper on TikTok with the screenplay option for iPhone. So like I said I love it it serves the purpose I definitely won't be buying tvs anymore because the product is so great I'm just so hurt about not being able to connect my phone .

I honestly am super surprised with the quality of this projector. Apps like Netflix and YouTube already comes installed. You can also cast your phone directly to projector. Love the quality. Totally worth the price.
A light and small projector, which is relatively clear even in the daytime. I think it can be used not only at home, but also at camping.The built-in app is also very fast to open.
Amazing! Easy to set up and hook to Wi-Fi picture is crisp and clear, sound is good. I will add a sound bar for better sound for farther away from the unit.
Picture quality is good, but the auto adjust doesn't work well, and I can't get any apps to work on it other than YouTube without adding a chromcast or a roku.

We bought this just for camping, to watch scary movies outdoors! We absolutely love it ! Small ,portable, convenient! Very simple plug n play smart projector! Has HDMI, Bluetooth, and all smart apps preloaded ! Perfect. Hi Def picture and amazing sound for a little projector. All tho we Bluetooth an external speaker for our movies outside! Perfect all around!

I'm very impressed on this little portable projector. Very easy to use. It has a small speaker inside but you can Bluetooth a speaker to making it sound better. Easily sync up your smartphone. It has apps already and you can install apps. Its so portable that I can't wait to take it to the beach or camping or even use it on my balcony.

Do not recommend. Only has 4-5 apps already installed and no option to download more. Quality and sound is poor . Plugged in one time and boxed it right back up to get a refund. Black Friday price was a false advertisement this item was never $399.99

it is a 40$ projector, not a 300$ projector that has been drastically reduced. Shameful marketing. It is worth what I paid. I hope Walmart is aware that they are using deceptive marketing practices. I just about want to return it because I was lied to, not because I feel ripped off.

Great projector for the price. Small size; big picture. Includes apps (YouTube, Netflix, etc.). Streaming video from a smart device wirelessly to the project works well. Easily connects to Bluetooth speakers for premium sound. Would be nice if adding more apps was a feature.

This is a handy little projector. The features work well. Just be aware that it produces very low lumen, so it requires a very dark viewing environment. I had no trouble connecting to the device with my phone and streaming video. It's a pretty good buy as long as you're aware it is not a bright projector.

I love that it has screen mirroring, which makes it easy to connect my phone. The sound is decent for listening, but you can always add a speaker for better audio. Perfect for family movie nights and definitely worth the price

It's alright it's not the best one out there but does what it needs to do I just use my Xbox for it the picture is good but when you change the picture settings the settings are extreme like the brightness gets way to bright even if you only put it up a couple notches if you change the sharpness (barely) it looks like things are outlined in sharpie but it has remote that works well and doesn't make a lot of noise the volume is very low even when it's all the way up so might need a Bluetooth speaker

picture is not great on it looks really pixelated even after adjusting all the settings, not very bright. Bluetooth works fine. Also doesn't seem to work with just any HDMI, only works with included HDMI for some reason, but they did include one so that was a plus.

I purchased this projector after seeing a version on social media. I was honestly blown away by the picture quality. It has a built in Android system, but an also be used with a Google stick or Roku device. I found it easier to use an add on device's remote control, but that's personal preference. The sound quality could be better, but I use earbuds and it meets expectations with those. You can pair a Bluetooth speaker for better volume. All in all, it's a great little projector for the price and extremely convenient.

i loved the price and how compact it is with the ease of use. what I find in operating it is hoe limited it is where you can place it, when tirned on the heat it produces was like a blow dryer . the screen wouldn't level out the functions are easy to navigaye but the picturr quslity to me wasnt as clear as i hoped. read and double read the instructions. but i gibmve it a 3 stars, the heat it blows out was a scary safetyhazzars. but thays just my thought and experience.

NOT 1080 as advertised. The native resolution of this unit is 720. That means the element within the projector that creates the display is 1280 x 720. It supports 1080, which means you can put 1080 video into it, but it will be scaled down. There is no internal battery. This must be plugged in with the included adapter. Actual power connector on the unit is a weird 4 pin port, with a 3 prong electrical plug. Back panel has a single full size HDMI port, and a USB-A port for connections. If a USB drive is connected, or an HDMI cable is inserted, the unit base will not be able to rotate completely, as it will hit the USB drive or cable. The underside of the base does include a 1/4" mounting thread so it can be mounted on a tripod. Focus ring works well and it does produce a sharp image. Menus are straight forward, and clean looking. Shortest distance I was able to get it in focus was about 40". The unit is light weight and easy to use. I bought this for Halloween projection mapping, and it works just fine. If you want to watch movies while camping, you'll need an external power source, like a solar generator. I don't believe this can be powered by USB, but I didn't test it. To turn on or off, press and hold the power button on the back end for about 3 seconds. Sound isn't bad, but not great. Internal fan is kinda loud which will drown out soft or quiet movies. NO external audio port. You can connect to Bluetooth speakers and the volume control will affect the Bluetooth level. There IS a delay in the audio. The audio is about half a second behind the video. Lip sync is noticeably off. If the connection is lost, the unit will revert back to internal speaker, after about 5-10 seconds. Extra bonus, this comes with (I think 7 different) stars and galaxy projections to shine on your ceiling, however, the frame rate is poor on these videos. Playback (of these star videos) are choppy. Video playback of external content is smooth. I took off 1 star because this is advertised as 1080, and it is not.

I bought this for a gift for Christmas. It looks like a very nice projector. I don't want to open it up because it is a Christmas gift. For the money it looks like a great deal. I also bought a portable screen and a sound bar. They like to have a movie night, every Saturday night. I know that the kids will love it, because of the size..... It should look like you are at the Drive -IN .......

Finally got the projector setup and turned on to discover the lens is dirty on the inside. Dirt spots show up in the middle of the screen with everything I try to watch making us miss the fine detail. Like watching a bad vhs tape. If that's not bad enough the projector constantly shuts off at random moments throughout the movie. Tech support recommends unplugging the projector to fix this problem. It does not correct the problem.

Works exceptionally well for the price and more features than something you spend hundreds of dollars on or even over a thousand this thing has more features so it's good for me and I'm sure it's good for others if you need something inexpensive that's got good quality and multiple features

My son moved into his own apartment right before Christmas. I knew he liked having a TV in his bedroom and figured he would want one in the living room as well. This was a much cheaper solution and he loved it. It projects right above his fireplace as if he had a TV mounted there and the picture is great. He was really surprised at how well they performed and is extremely happy with it.

fraud! i didn't order and i returned it with code i was sent . they refunded them recharged me when i contested it with my card Co they lied n said i ordered 2 and only returned one. despite me providing proof i was only sent one they still wouldn't help me. can't get anyone to figure ot out. scammed me. again note that i didn't even purchase the item. it was ordered in the middle of the night n no one else was here

picture is not great on it looks really pixelated even after adjusting all the settings, not very bright. Bluetooth works fine. Also doesn't seem to work with just any HDMI, only works with included HDMI for some reason, but they did include one so that was a plus.

The projector is compact and easy to set up, but the quality of the picture is not good. The room needs to be pitch black and the brightness level is very poor. I don't think I'll be able to use if outdoors unless it's very dark. This projector may be a good fit for holiday decor use to project images or holiday images off windows, but for movie use.. not great. Might be better off paying a bit more for a better quality projector.

I disliked the remote it is really cheaply made, it doesn't work properly, now i have to buy a replacement. If i still had the box i would've returned it and asked for a new one. keep in mind its just the remote the projector is awesome i hooked my my onn box fire stick and roku and all work flawless, the mirroring from your phone is pretty cool but don't recommend

The light is VERY dim. You have to be almost in a completely black room to get a good picture quality. The image is a far cry from HD. Very blurry and pixelated. The setup and usage is super easy, so that's the up-side to it. I only paid $49 since it was on sale, so for the price, I guess you get what you pay for. I would not recommend it. In hindsight, I might have been better off in the $100-$200 range to get a higher-quality projector.

The only good thing about this projector is it's easy to set up with plug and play, that being said, I would not recommend this to be anyone's main viewing device in their house hold. It is made of Flimsy plastic and weighs less than a can of soda. The power cable is 3 feet long and you have to really do some work to plug it into the back of the device because of the limited room the rotating stand has. The operating system that the device runs on looks really sketchy, like it says it has the google play store, but I would rather use my firestick than risk getting my account hacked from logging into this device. I managed to buy this on sale for $40 and it's honestly not even worth that much, but if you want something that's portable and mabe you want to use as a fun gimmick for a kids room, then that would be better, but I don't see this lasting a year.

It's very hard to get it where you want it. The head does not move smoothly. It is super loud!!! The remote is very tedious to type in username and passwords. Its def not user friendly. The picture quality is very good. its hard to hear over the noise emitting from the unit. BUT I only bought it to make my wall a window from a medieval castle and it works perfectly for that!!! i also haven't figured out how its portable/rechargeable. i had it plugged in all night and it would not stay on once unplugged. maybe it's just me? hopefully I'll figure it out eventually.

I have to admit I wasn't expecting this to work as well as it does, but I'm impressed. Definitely got my money's worth. Bluetooth connection is quick, it connects to WiFi easily, and the auto adjusting works well. Just make sure the room you're using it in is good and dark, and it's pretty much plug and play, easy enough for me to set up.

This was a much cheaper solution and he loved it. It projects right above his fireplace as if he had a TV mounted there and the picture is great. This is a handy little projector. The features work well. Just be aware that it produces very low lumen, so it requires a very dark viewing environment. I had no trouble connecting to the device with my phone and streaming video. It's a pretty good buy as long as you're aware it is not a bright projector.

Great projector for the price. Small size; big picture. Includes apps (YouTube, Netflix, etc.). Streaming video from a smart device wirelessly to the project works well. Easily connects to Bluetooth speakers for premium sound. Would be nice if adding more apps was a feature.

The picture is great quality as advertised but for some reason the Bluetooth won't connect to my phone or any other speakers for better surround sound. The built in speaker works but isn't very loud at all. It connects to WiFi and hotspots with no problem but I wouldn't stream over the recommended view time of 2 hours without 20 min rest due to overheating. And it will overheat. Overall not bad for the price and crazy mark down.

Absolutely loved this projector at first, now it's been a few months since we purchased and it completely stopped working. None of the apps load or if they do no shows/movies will load. They say they need updated then say the newest version doesn't work on this model.

My grands love it! They project their show on the wall and on the ceiling. They travel with it and use it in a hotel, while visiting family, or in an RV. For the price, I would say it's 5 stars and for as little as it costs, no worries if something happens to it, as they use it all the time. Such a fun way to get them to chill and relax.

Just not very good overall , picture is not bright enough and has no brightness adjustment . Picture is ok not great but the worst part of this projector is its sound is absolutely horrible unless you have a Bluetooth speaker to connect with . I'm returning this one and will upgrade
I loved it! Picture is clear%26 the sound is good as well. Not a big fan of the remote but it manages.
It's really useful having access to ios that other projectors don't offer and it's sleek, quiet and easy to setup.
Ability to cast the screen from any angle. I'd like to be able to adjust the volume output of the device, but there's no problem with that.
